In an interview with CGTN's Wang Guan, Frederic Laferriere, president of the Paris Departmental Olympics and Sports Committee, emphasized the importance of the new Olympic motto, "Faster, Higher, Stronger - Together." He highlighted the complete inclusiveness of the Games, which has achieved full gender parity and prioritizes sustainable development and low-energy transportation, setting an example for future events.
